description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a dark gray synthetic upper with three prominent white stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The shoes have a combination closure system with both standard black laces and a single Velcro strap across the top for added security and ease of use. The midsole and outsole are white, providing a clean contrast to the darker upper, and the heel area displays the Adidas logo in white. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for casual urban wear or light sports activities. The shoes appear to be well-padded for comfort, with a slightly rounded toe and reinforced heel. The materials suggest a blend of synthetic leather, rubber, and textile, offering durability and flexibility for everyday use.
description: A pair of dark gray Adidas sneakers with white stripes, black laces, and a Velcro strap, featuring a white sole and visible branding. The design is sporty, modern, and well-cushioned for urban or casual use.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the black laces, Velcro strap, white stripes, and rounded toe.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the Adidas logo on the heel and the white midsole.
description_view_2: Back angle emphasizing the heel branding and the overall shape of the shoes.
description_view_3: Front and opposite side view displaying the Velcro strap open and the three white stripes.
attribute_logo: White 'Adidas' text logo on the heel and side of the sole; three white stripes on the side panels.
